productDisplayName: Lino Perros Men Navy Blue Wallet
description: Style NoteCrafted from leather, this navy blue and brown wallet from lino perros is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed man. Carry your monetary essentials with ease in this classic wallet.Product DetailsNavy blue upper colour blocked with brown overlay on the front with embossed brandingHas two main compartmentsTwo card slots, one photo id holder and a slip pocket on the left foldOne slip pocket and one buttonable coin pocket on the right foldMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustSizeDimensions: 11 cm x 9.5 cm
